items.title: Sync scoring weights across all three pages
items.note: app.py, equity_scout.py, market_screener.py each have independent sliders. Same ticker can score differently. Store active weights in session state and read on all pages.

items.title: Punch list page — light theme polish
items.note: Current light-theme styling is functional but basic. Could improve card layout, spacing, and typography to better match the rest of the app. Low priority — works fine as-is.

items.note: SEC and Yahoo Finance buttons added directly to Equity Scout page after Deep Dive click. Complete.

items.note: Scan for stocks matching specific criteria: Dividend Aristocrats, commodity ETFs, Long Squeeze survivors.

items.note: Daily cap gains / tax-loss harvesting scanner to replace what Morgan Stanley Parametric currently does.

items.title: Separate maintenance vs growth capex
items.note: Currently using total investing CF as proxy — conservative but imprecise. Investigate Polygon v1 fields.

items.title: D&A direct from financials (not proxy)
items.note: Wired into fetch_score_data (app.py, market_screener.py) via new Massive v1 depreciation_depletion_and_amortization field. Still using proxy in equity_scout fetch_fundamentals — carry forward.

items.title: Historical score trending for a ticker
items.note: How has conviction score changed over 3-5 years? Requires pulling multiple annual filings from Polygon.

items.title: ⚠️ Massive API migration — DEADLINE June 22 2026
items.note: vX endpoint sunsets June 22. v1 migration is built with vX fallback. Blocker: add Financials & Ratios Expansion ($29/mo) at massive.com dashboard. Once added, v1 activates automatically.

items.title: Replace yfinance foreign ADR scoring with Morningstar via Rapid API
items.note: ASML, ARGX etc. have no SEC filings. Current yfinance fallback works but unreliable. Morningstar ~$10/mo. Deferred until tool proves out on personal portfolio.

items.title: Replace yfinance ETF dist_yield with Polygon when field improves
items.note: Polygon distribution_yield field sparse for ETFs — rebalanced out currently. Picks up automatically when Polygon improves coverage.

items.title: Activate Plaid live connection to Morgan Stanley
items.note: Full Plaid flow built (connect.py, plaid_data.py). Blocker: MS refusing connection despite third-party sharing enabled. Try: wait 24-48hrs, call MS 1-800-869-3326, toggle from mobile app. Financial planner contacted. Sandbox works: user_good/pass_good, PLAID_ENV=sandbox.

items.title: Watchlist / portfolio tracker persistence across sessions
items.note: Saved tickers and notes persist between Streamlit sessions. Options: SQLite, Supabase, secrets-backed JSON.

items.note: Authentication, per-user portfolios, isolated sessions for commercial product launch.

items.note: Payment infrastructure and new-user onboarding. Flat fee not AUM%. Target: middle-class investors.

items.title: Yodlee/Finicity MS API research
items.note: Need to figure out a solution to API directly to Morgn Stanley down load files

items.title: "Refresh Data" button
items.note: Semi-auto API work around for lack of direct API connection for Morgan Stanly download files

items.title: Merge ms_download.py and push_files.py into single script
items.note: Currently requires two separate script runs to download and push MS data. Merge into one seamless workflow — download xlsx, convert, push to GitHub in one command.

items.title: Research Yodlee/Finicity for MS API connectivity
items.note: Plaid does not support Morgan Stanley. Evaluate Yodlee and Finicity as alternatives to eliminate MFA requirement and enable cloud-based automated refresh. Long-term fix for the Refresh Data button.

items.title: Fix ms_download.py file detection — eliminate push_files.py manual step
items.note: Script clicks Download successfully but cannot detect files in Downloads folder. Files land with proper names (Holdings Ungrouped.xlsx, Activity.xlsx, Realized GL.xlsx) but snapshot detection fails. Fix detection logic so script handles full workflow end to end.

items.title: Fix scoring weights bug — weight changes not affecting scores
items.note: Changing weight sliders on Equity Scout and Market Screener has no effect on output scores. Affects both pages. Core functionality broken — fix before any scoring model changes. Likely a session state or recalculation issue.

items.title: Remove or demote Gross Margin from composite scoring
items.note: Gross margin is too context-dependent to be a universal moat indicator. High GM businesses with no moat (Groupon 90% GM, strong buy) and low GM businesses with strong moats (Costco 13% GM, 46 score) both score incorrectly. Remove from composite or limit to intra-industry comparison only.

items.title: Restructure Debt/FCF — use outstanding principal and cash available for debt service
items.note: Replace carrying value of debt with outstanding principal. Replace standard FCF with cash available for debt service. Note: leverage on negative working capital float (insurance model) can be sound practice — avoid penalizing structural float users. Do not use as binary positive/negative scoring.

items.title: Demote FCF Yield and Price/Owner Earnings to secondary screens
items.note: Both are valuation metrics — having both in composite double-weights relative value. Great businesses (V, MA) will always look expensive. Per Munger: better to buy great business at fair price than fair business at great price. Move both to secondary screen: quality first, then check if price is reasonable

items.title: Overhaul ROIC — historical 10-year cash accounting basis
items.note: Current ROIC uses single-period accrual accounting. Replace with 10-year historical trend, cash accounting view (owners earnings equivalent). Any company returning >12% after-tax ROIC for 10+ years almost certainly has a durable competitive advantage. Heavily increase default weight.

items.title: Fix interest coverage — use interest paid and cash available for debt service
items.note: Replace interest expense (accrual) with interest paid (cash). Replace EBITDA/earnings denominator with cash available for debt service. Add capitalized interest check. Express as margin (% interest paid to cash available for debt service) alongside principal multiple.

items.title: Add financial firm detection — flag for alternative scoring
items.note: Banks, insurers, asset managers, mortgage lenders, broker-dealers use fundamentally different accounting. Standard FCF/debt/margin metrics are meaningless or misleading for these firms (JPM scores 20, RKT scores 0). Detect financial firms and flag with warning that standard scoring does not apply. Build alternative model later.

items.title: Add cyclical firm detection — flag for full-cycle analysis caveat
items.note: Current model uses latest year data — makes it a momentum scout for cyclicals. Deere, Warrior Met Coal, CF Industries, ADM all score based on where they are in the cycle not intrinsic value. Detect cyclicals and flag that single-period scoring is unreliable. Full-cycle ROIC analysis needed.

items.title: Add scoring transparency — show raw data driving each metric
items.note: Users cannot see what underlying financial data is being pulled or how each metric is calculated. Add expandable detail panel showing raw inputs (revenue, FCF, debt figures etc.) and how they map to each score component. Critical for trust and debugging.

items.title: Add operating metrics panel to Equity Scout
items.note: Add supplemental panel showing: working capital ratios, operating cash profile, cash conversion as % of revenue, FCF yield as % of revenue (not market cap). Goal: efficiency view of operations independent of market valuation. Normalise to cash accounting where possible.

items.title: Add historical ROIC trending — multi-year view
items.note: Current scoring uses single period ROIC. Add multi-year ROIC chart (5-10 years) to Equity Scout deep dive. Shows consistency and trajectory of capital returns — key to identifying durable competitive advantage vs cyclical spike.

items.title: Total allocation view — combine direct + fund exposure by name
items.note: Holdings like ASML appear both as direct holding and inside ETFs/funds. Dashboard should show total economic exposure to each name across all vehicles. Exception: hedge funds isolating volatility should be treated separately.

items.title: Fund deep dive — separate format for ETFs and mutual funds
items.note: Holdings Explorer deep dive currently stock-focused. Add fund-specific deep dive showing: top holdings, historical performance, expense ratio, fund manager, fund summary. Different format than stock deep dive.

items.title: Punch list — add confirmation dialog to prevent accidental edits
items.note: Checkbox accidentally marked item as done and it disappeared from view. Add confirmation dialog before marking done or deleting. Also consider basic access control for commercial version to prevent unauthorized edits.

items.title: Retirement modeler — add cash/treasuries/equities allocator
items.note: Add allocation slider or input for cash, treasuries, and equities split. Feed into Monte Carlo simulation assumptions — different return/volatility profiles per asset class.

items.title: Retirement modeler — historical crisis scenario overlays
items.note: Add case study scenarios to retirement simulation: Japan-style stagnation, 1970s-80s oil crisis, Great Depression, GFC, Asian Financial Crisis, EU sovereign debt crisis. Show impact on portfolio and retirement outcome under each scenario.

items.title: Need to download roll 12 month files from MS
items.note: We need to get rolling 12 month and YTD transactions and PY Capital GL
